prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve got this. That task has been looming all morning, but here’s the truth: you’re stronger than your hesitation. The first step is always the hardest—that moment when you go from *thinking* to *doing*. So take a deep breath, lean in, and just begin. You don’t have to do it perfectly; you just have to start. Momentum builds with action, and every second you spend working on it is a victory over procrastination. One small effort now will feel a thousand times better than hours of guilt later. Go on—show yourself what you’re made of. You've done hard things before. This is just the next one. Now move. 💪✨
